trip_score_badge.description: Circular gauge representing the 0-100 proprietary score. Use conic-gradient with accent and secondary_accent colors. Prominent gauge ring with number in center.

trip_card_horizontal.description: Large horizontal hero card for upcoming trips. Uses background image with overlay bg-black/40. Rounded-2xl, inner content features dates, countdown, companion avatars (overlapping), and Trip Score badge.

feed_card.description: Standard feed card. Vertical layout. Image top (max-h-64), body below. Features creator info, title, trip score, and primary 'Steal Itinerary' button.

invite_unlock_card.description: Premium dark unlock card. Uses surface color with subtle border-white/5. Horizontal icon row (Score, Map, Steal, Group, Creators). Heavy use of inner glow and blur. 'Invite Friends' CTA in Accent color.

ai_chat_bubble.description: For AI Planner. User messages in #1B1F3B (Primary), AI messages in glassmorphism (rgba(255,255,255,0.05)) with backdrop-blur. Animated generating state with checklist.

itinerary_day_block.description: Vertical timeline layout for multi-day itineraries. Morning/Afternoon/Evening blocks. Border-l-2 with accent color. Cards for transport, costs, restaurants.

profile_travel_map.description: Interactive map highlighting visited countries. Dark mode map styling (custom Mapbox or similar). Highlight countries using secondary_accent (#14B8A6).

onboarding_pill_buttons.description: Multi-step quiz buttons. Fully rounded (rounded-full). Active state uses accent color (#5B67FF), inactive uses glass surface.

bottom_navigation.description: Fixed at bottom, glassmorphism surface. 5 icons: Home, Explore, Planner, Trips, Profile. Active tab uses accent color.

screens.onboarding: Multi-step flow. Splash -> Quiz (frequency, age, budget, companions, interests, contacts, follow creators) -> Welcome. Use smooth spring transitions between steps.
screens.home: Upcoming Trips (horizontal scroll snap). '5 invites left' premium card. Bottom navigation active.
screens.feed: Personalized social feed. Mix of creator content and AI suggestions. 'Steal Itinerary' is primary action.
screens.explore: Search bar, category pills (Beaches, Luxury, etc.), interactive map, trending destinations grid.
screens.planner: AI Chat interface. Shifts from chat to generated itinerary view with budget breakdown donut chart.
screens.trips: 4 Tabs (Upcoming, Past, Saved, Stolen). Grid/List view of trip cards.
screens.profile: User header, stats grid (Score gauge), travel map, saved trips grid.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build this as a mobile-first web app using React and Tailwind. Limit the max-width to simulate a mobile app layout (e.g., max-w-md mx-auto h-screen overflow-hidden) unless building an actual React Native app.
Use Phosphor or Lucide icons for the bottom navigation and action buttons.
Ensure glassmorphism layers (surface_glass) have the correct backdrop-blur and a subtle 1px border (border-white/5) for crisp edges.
For the circular Trip Score gauge, utilize an SVG with stroke-dasharray, or an accessible Shadcn-styled radial bar.
Use framer-motion for spring animations, screen transitions, and stagger effects.
Every interactive element, button, and key piece of info MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
